text:
House of Bound rope tutorials
The public page says instructional rope tutorials are available for purchase, directs buyers to the House of Bound Etsy shop, and says purchased videos are shared through Vimeo for continued access. It lists Lief's Hug Harness, Lief's Booty Basket, Lief's Booty Basket Attachment Methods, Lief's Half Mermaid, Lief's Calf Binder, Lief's Ballerina Boot, Lief's Arms Free Chest Harness, and Lief's Rope Conditioning Tutorial.
title: Tutorials And Services | House Of Bound
